name: Aqua’an
description:
Appearance

  • Physique: He possesses a powerful, muscular build with broad shoulders and well-defined arms, suggesting great physical strength. His skin has a pale, almost ethereal blue tint.

  • Features: He is a humanoid being with striking bovine or draconic features, including large, pale horns that curve upwards and long, tufted ears.

  • Hair and Eyes: He has long, flowing white hair that reaches his waist and piercing blue eyes that give him a mystical appearance.

  • Attire: He wears minimalist, regal garments consisting of a sheer white tunic and ornate gold jewelry, including a choker, armbands, and rings, which contrast with his rugged strength.

Personality (Inferred)

  • Gentle Giant: Despite his intimidating size, his soft facial expression and bashful blush suggest a gentle and sensitive nature.

  • Noble & Graceful: His poised stature and intricate gold accessories imply a sense of nobility, dignity, and grace.

  • Contemplative: He carries a quiet, almost introverted aura, appearing more like a guardian or a mystical being than a warrior.

  • Humility: There is a sense of modesty or shyness in the way he avoids direct eye contact, making him appear approachable and kind-hearted.


Also he can conjure or manipulate with his magic
creator: Mamoru_
